summary: Completed Stage 7-8-9 frontend testing for CrickPredict PWA. All frontend wiring for Contest System, Prediction Flow, and Leaderboard pages working correctly. 16 test scenarios passed.
passed_tests: Login flow: Get Started -> Phone (9876543210) -> Continue -> Login link -> PIN (1234) -> Home page loads
Home page shows 7 match cards with team logos (TTA vs TTB, MI vs CSK, RCB vs KKR, DC vs PBKS, etc)
Home page shows user greeting 'Hey, TestPlayer_4360!' and balance (11,000 coins)
Home page shows Live badge on Test Tournament match
Click match card -> Match Detail page loads with team hero card and contests list
Match Detail page shows 4 contests with Join/Predict/Results buttons based on status
Bottom Nav: Home, My Contest, Wallet, Profile - all tabs switch correctly
My Contests page: shows 2 joined contests (Free Contest - OPEN, Free Prediction Contest - COMPLETED)
My Contests page: filter tabs (All/Open/Live/Completed) work correctly
My Contests page: shows team badges (MI vs CSK), points, rank, and prediction stats
Click open contest from My Contests -> navigates to Prediction page
Prediction page: 11 question dots displayed with navigation
Prediction page: question card with Hindi + English text, category badge, points
Prediction page: 4 options (A/B/C/D) with Hindi + English text, selection highlights correctly
Prediction page: Previous/Next navigation works, answer count updates (X/11 Answered)
Prediction page: Submit button on last question, changes to 'Submitted!' after submission
Click completed contest from My Contests -> navigates to Leaderboard page
Leaderboard page: trophy icon, contest name, player count, prize pool displayed
Leaderboard page: 'Your Position' section shows rank #1 with 25 pts
Leaderboard page: rank list with username, team name, points, prize won (+500)
Back button navigation works: Prediction->Back, Leaderboard->Back, MatchDetail->Back
Rank button on Prediction page -> navigates to Leaderboard for that contest
Match Detail page: Join button calls API and navigates to Prediction page
Match Detail page: 'Predict' button shows for already-joined contests
Match Detail page: 'Results' button shows for completed contests and opens leaderboard
Wallet page: shows balance (11,000), daily reward, transaction history (Contest Win +500, Daily Reward +500, Signup Bonus +10,000)
Profile page: shows username, rank (Rookie), phone, stats (1 Matches, 1 Won, 0 Points), referral code (8I9EPH), logout button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 7-8-9 frontend wiring complete. All pages (MyContests, Predictions, Leaderboard) fully functional. Test user has 11,000 coins (10,000 signup + 500 daily + 500 contest win). User has joined 3 contests: Free Contest (open), Free Prediction Contest (completed, rank #1), Mini Contest (just joined). Prediction submission working. All navigation flows verified.
